name: Bubble and Squeak (Two Fat Ladies)
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces cooked cabbage or sprouts, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely chop the potatoes and crush slightly.
2. In a frying pan melt half the fat and lightly fry the onion.
3. Mix in the potato and greens and season well with salt and black pepper.
4. Add more dripping or lard as needed.
5. Press the mixture into the hot fat and fry over moderate heat until browned on one side.
6. Turn the bubble over, add the remaining fat, and fry until the other side is browned.
